body.ticket.title: Request for cancellation and refund
body.ticket.description:
----------------------------------------------

北垣洋基, Jun 10, 2026, 13:36

Dear MyPersonality Support Team,

I recently noticed recurring charges on my credit card from MyPersonality.I took the 16-type personality test, but I did not intend to subscribe to a monthly/recurring plan.

Please cancel my subscription immediately and stop any future charges.I would also like to request a refund for the recent charges, as I was not aware that I had subscribed to a recurring service.

【Account information】
– Name: Hiroki Kitagaki
– Email address I used to register: knanoeins1122@gmail.com
– Last 4 digits of the card: 9758
– Approximate date of the first charge: 2026-05-12
– Recent charge: 2026-05-12, USD 51.78
– Country: Japan

I look forward to your confirmation of the cancellation and refund.

Best regards,
Hiroki Kitagaki
